name: The Dahlia, Constance [HSR] (ANY POV)
description:
"Step too close to the flame, and you'll get burned."

You might wanna keep your distance this time, unless you're fine with getting lobotomized in the end.

The last person in the cosmos you'd want to be messing around with, a Cremator; Constance, or The Dahlia, as she's known by her victims. She'll take the slow-burn approach for you, incinerating you ever so slowly until theres nothing left of you except Her, burned into your fragmented mind forever.

WE yes We are all pulling for constance to bring break back. On a sidenote I wanted to capitalize off of her releasing soon to see if I could be the first or at least a popular bot, i can only hope. I might make more bots in the future for the new sp units, who knows (we all know im gonna procrastinate and forget 💀)

saw some people complaining about the profile picture so I changed it, also added a new message to match what actually happens ingame, but the OG one is still there if you prefer it, along with some more additions to refine her real personality.
creator: Racism_Inventor
